project: 豆包爱学 — Doubao Ai Xue (native iOS + macOS)
source: RESEARCH.md feature backlog (67 features) → ARCHITECTURE.md → PLAN.md

legend.passes: true only when the feature is reachable in-app, mock-backed, all states handled, and the app builds green on iOS + macOS

foundation.description: Design system: tokens (colors/typography/spacing/radius/shadow) + components + ViewState/DBStateView + Liquid Glass + MathText
SwiftData CloudKit-compatible models + enums + Codable payloads; ModelContainer builds
IntelligenceService protocol + DTOs + MockIntelligenceService + FoundationModelsService(canImport) + RoutePolicy + environment injection
ContentCatalog (courses/poems/word lists/textbook tree/tools/sample problems) + ModelContainerFactory + SampleData seeding
AppRouter + AppEnvironment + adaptive AppShell (TabView/NavigationSplitView) + RootView + app wiring; app launches green

features.description: 拍照搜题: capture/import → calibrate → recognized question
框选单题: single-problem crop/region selection
整页批改: multi-problem detection + per-item ✓/✗
题目识别: multimodal OCR (printed/handwriting/formulas), editable
思路·步骤·答案·知识点 structured solution + action row
公式渲染/图示: LaTeX-ish + diagrams, accessible
举一反三: generate similar practice problems
学科识别: subject auto-detect + routing
搜题历史: per-problem resumable threads
错题本: collect/classify/review wrong questions + 组卷/export
错因分析 + knowledge-graph weak-point mapping
靶向练习/每日必练 daily targeted set
豆包老师: voice-first dynamic blackboard tutor (streamed)
语音实时互动 + 是否听懂了 hold-to-talk comprehension loop
追问: interruptible follow-up Q&A (voice+typed)
分层引导: grade-level tiered explanation adaptation
知识问答/知识专家 open-domain interactive Q&A
成长挚友 emotional companion (safety-gated)
识万物 recognize-anything multimodal lens
多模态输入: photo/text/voice/handwriting unified composer
AI串联: intent dispatch to specialized skills
接续学习: conversation session + resumable history
作文批改: 综合/分句/score/升格/read-aloud, coach-not-write
口算批改: batch arithmetic grading ✓/✗ + 错因
口算练习/数学练习 grade-adaptive drill
听写: TTS read + write + OCR auto-check
背单词: SwiftData SRS decks + cards + quiz
英语口语: scenario role-play + correction + pronunciation score
课文翻译: passage OCR → bilingual + read-aloud + gloss
古诗文/文言文: study page + recite check + talk-to-poet
豆包课堂: interactive AI video lessons + timestamp quizzes + trust badge
我的课程/定制课程 on-demand lesson generation
知识点讲解 2.0 (背景→内容→价值) + personal knowledge graph
靶向练习 graph-driven daily weak-point training
文档/PDF问答: import → summary/outline + chat Q&A
学习报告/学情周报: time/mastery/trend charts + 薄弱点预警
教材同步: grade/edition/chapter aligned content + question bank
4-tab bottom nav (首页/学习/工具/我的) adaptive to split view
首次启动引导 + 年级选择 wizard → LearnerProfile
账号登录 (Sign in with Apple + guest)
我的 personal center: header/stats/settings/history
工具 hub grid of all utilities + search
空/加载/错误/离线 cross-cutting state system
视觉设计/品牌: mascot, warm rounded, Liquid Glass, Dark Mode
家长验证/家长模式: gate, answer-hiding, controls, report
Anti-cheat Learn Mode (attempt-first, graduated hints, paste-detect)
On-device vs enhanced route policy + badge
Unified in-app search across tools/history/错题本/decks/courses/docs
App Intents/Siri/Spotlight (solve/dictation/review/tutor)
Settings: appearance/voice/route/notifications/Learn Mode/account
多模型支持: pick cloud AI provider/model (通义千问/豆包/MiniMax/Claude/Gemini/OpenAI/GLM/Kimi/DeepSeek), Keychain key, wired through every AI feature via \.intelligence; offline fallback

深度互联: Route.drill(knowledgePointID:) + router.openDrill — Home 今日靶向练习 / 错题 举一反三 / 报告 专项练习 / 知识点 去练习 all launch practice pre-targeted at the right KP; KnowledgePoint 典型错题 section; Document 让豆包老师精讲 → tutor

成就墙: XP/等级 ring + 连续打卡 heat-strip + tiered (铜/银/金/铂) badge wall with locked-progress + persisted unlock dates + celebration; derived live from history; ToolKind.achievements + Route.achievements + Profile entry
macOS 菜单与快捷键: 学习 menu (拍照解题 ⌘N, 批改 ⇧⌘G, 今日练习 ⌘T, 问豆包 ⌘L, 搜索 ⌘F) + 前往 menu (sections ⌘1–⌘9, 成就) wired to AppRouter
今日: single-glance daily planner — goal ring + 打卡 streak, 今日靶向练习, due 错题复习, due 背单词, 继续学习 course, 7-day 时长 chart; all derived + deep-linked via AppRouter; ToolKind.today
科学计算器 + 公式库: keypad evaluated via ArithmeticEvaluator with @AppStorage history; subject-categorized formula reference (MathText), tap to compute or 问豆包; ToolKind.calculator
专注 · 番茄钟: configurable 专注/休息 cycles with circular countdown; each completed block logs ActivityLog(kindRaw:focus) into 学习报告/今日; ToolKind.focus
实时扫题: iOS VisionKit DataScanner live text capture → editable review → SolveResultView pipeline; graceful macOS/unsupported fallback to 拍照解题; ToolKind.liveScan
豆包老师 声音与语速: dialect/accent picker (普通话/粤语/台湾国语/English, installed-voice-aware) + 语速 slider + 试听; narration uses voiceAccent.languageTag; sheet wired into TutorSessionView toolbar
作文评分雷达图: EssayFeedbackView rubric shown as a radar chart (≥3 维度) with bar-chart fallback + segmented toggle

作业批改: upload a workbook page (拍照/相册/文件) → AI grades every question into a structured GradedWorkbook (subject-agnostic schema: math/语文/English/any), rendered as score summary + per-question ✓/✗/◐ cards with student vs correct answer, explanation, 错因, 知识点 chips, steps, rubric. Multimodal (vision) on capable cloud models, OCR-text on others, deterministic offline engine as universal fallback. ToolKind.gradeWorkbook + Home tile + macOS ⇧⌘G
批改历史: every grading persists original photo + structured GradedWorkbook + metadata as WorkbookGradeRecord; history list re-renders any past grading identically and offline; delete via context menu
题库: save wrong questions (from 作业批改/拍题/错题本) or any question for review into BankedQuestion; filter by subject/星标, reveal answers, star, delete, 让豆包老师讲. ToolKind.questionBank + Home tile + macOS ⇧⌘B

智能出题: select banked questions (or use the filtered list) → AI generates 同类练习 (similarProblems, grouped by subject, seeded with question text + 知识点) in a sheet with attempt/reveal + 加入题库 for generated items

多模态视觉: CloudChatClient.completeVision (openAI image_url / anthropic base64 / gemini inline_data) + AIProvider.supportsVision; powers 作业批改 and 拍照解题 (image flows into SolveRequest) on vision-capable models; graceful OCR-text + offline fallbacks
